description: Prepare 1 high-quality article on "Guide to Securing LLMs against prompt spoofing" for tmrw mtg. Incl. detailed outline, in-depth research, stats, facts, case studies.  Use GPT, perplexity, you.com for sources. Format w/ bullet points, engaging lang.
Follow up on CMS access for Promptfoo. Check if we received login/instructions, request if not. Learn publishing process.
Create templates for enriching technical content w/ additional research, citations. Integrate into workflow after perfecting initial article.
Reiterate 5 articles/week goal (not 10) in tmrw's Promptfoo meeting.
